{{Quote|A bargain is a mober snake with a head at each end, Hutt Grappa. It is only safe if both ends are held.|Zzzanmxl|<ref name="CE3">[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 3|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 3]]</ref>}}
'''Zzzanmxl''' was the leader of a band of [[Zanibar]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] and [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]].

==Biography==
He and his troops worked for [[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] during the time of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Zzzanmxl had made a deal with Grappa that they would work for him and in return, he would provide them with sentients that they could sacrifice in their religious rituals.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
According to [[Daniel Wallace]], Zzzanmxl is the last entry in the [[Holocron continuity database]].<ref name="DanWallaceBlog">{{Blog|danwallace|112|The Last Word in Star Wars}}</ref>
